name: hmi · UDTs
note: ISA-101 HMI UDTs. See /docs/standards/konomi/isa101/ for the full dense spec.

ScreenLayer.desc: One of the five ISA-101 HMI layers (L1 Overview … L5 Support).

ColorMeaning.desc: Semantic color for an equipment state (ISA-101 palette).

Faceplate.desc: Operator faceplate bound to an equipment tag.

NavTarget.desc: Entry in the HMI navigation history ring.

AlarmBadge.desc: Aggregated alarm count visible at every screen layer.
